rationale: Title X is more precise for Europace: it names pulsed field ablation in full, preserves the comparator, defines the population, study type, trial acronym, and European multicentre scope. The extra word length is acceptable for a trial rationale/design title because it adds relevant specificity.
loser_weakness: Title Y is cleaner and shorter, but “pulsed field versus radiofrequency ablation” is slightly elliptical and it omits the European scope, reducing specificity for the same study.
